name: Feature request

---

## Problem

What workflow or limitation would this improve?

## Proposed solution

Describe the behavior you would like Shelfline to support.

## Alternatives

What workarounds or other designs have you considered?

## Scope notes

Mention affected areas, such as catalog browsing, downloads, library management,
EPUB reading, configuration, credentials, or documentation.
